---
title: "Appendix: Code and Design References"
---

This appendix points to the repositories and design threads behind the work discussed in this booklet.

::: {.callout-note}
The scratch-built operator repository may be access-controlled depending on where this booklet is shared. The link is still useful for team members who already have access.
:::

## Scratch-Built Operator

- Our scratch-built operator repository: [DharmendraChoudhary67/valkey-cluster-operator](https://github.com/DharmendraChoudhary67/valkey-cluster-operator)

## Reference Operator

- OpsTree Redis Operator: [OT-CONTAINER-KIT/redis-operator](https://github.com/OT-CONTAINER-KIT/redis-operator)

## Official Valkey Operator

- Upstream project: [valkey-io/valkey-operator](https://github.com/valkey-io/valkey-operator)
- Our fork used for design and implementation work: [DharmendraChoudhary67/valkey-operator](https://github.com/DharmendraChoudhary67/valkey-operator)

## Change Threads We Worked Through

- Earlier StatefulSet `volumeClaimTemplates` persistence branch: [codex/statefulset-pvc-storage](https://github.com/DharmendraChoudhary67/valkey-operator/tree/codex/statefulset-pvc-storage)
- Earlier StatefulSet persistence compare view: [main...codex/statefulset-pvc-storage](https://github.com/DharmendraChoudhary67/valkey-operator/compare/main...codex/statefulset-pvc-storage)
- `ValkeyNode`-managed persistence compare view: [main...codex/valkeynode-managed-persistence](https://github.com/DharmendraChoudhary67/valkey-operator/compare/main...codex/valkeynode-managed-persistence)

## Design Discussions

- Persistence design discussion: [Issue #121](https://github.com/valkey-io/valkey-operator/issues/121)
- Shard-aware placement discussion: [Issue #146](https://github.com/valkey-io/valkey-operator/issues/146)
